purpose: Fast in-game validation of CustomNPCs-Unofficial for Ascendant Realms named NPCs, equipment, name/title readability, simple dialogue, and clone saving.

intended_modded_showcase.mainhand: Iron's Spells staff/cane after confirming the exact JEI item id
intended_modded_showcase.head: Artifacts or Iron's Spells social/headwear after confirming the exact JEI item id
intended_modded_showcase.chest: robe or guild clothing after confirming the exact JEI item id

test_profiles.expected_behavior: Stationary or slow wander, does not attack, short greeting line, visible name/title.

intended_modded_showcase.mainhand: Truthseeker-style authority weapon after confirming the exact live item id
intended_modded_showcase.head: Iron's Spells crown after confirming the exact JEI item id
intended_modded_showcase.chest: Fantasy Armor hero chestplate after confirming the exact JEI item id

test_profiles.expected_behavior: Stationary, high-authority silhouette, no gear drops, visible rank/name.

intended_modded_showcase.head: Immersive Armors heavy helmet after confirming the exact JEI item id
intended_modded_showcase.chest: Immersive Armors heavy chestplate after confirming the exact JEI item id

test_profiles.expected_behavior: Can target hostile mobs in a controlled creative test without attacking players.

intended_modded_showcase.mainhand: Simply Swords runic or unique weapon after confirming the exact JEI item id
intended_modded_showcase.chest: Fantasy Armor hunter/rival chestpiece after confirming the exact JEI item id

test_profiles.expected_behavior: Combat-capable rival prototype for checking animations, health bar, nameplate readability, and drop policy.

acceptance_checks: NPC Wand opens the edit UI without client crash.
Created NPC can hold visible modded weapons and wear visible armor.
Friendly NPC does not attack the player.
Combat NPC can fight a vanilla zombie in a controlled creative test.
Mob Cloner can save and respawn the finished prototype.
Disconnect/rejoin keeps the test NPCs stable.
